title: How a man of God lives when no one is watching
caption:
The version of you that no one sees is the real one. God already knows what it is.

The man who opens his Bible on a Tuesday no one will praise him for. The man whose phone doesn't have a second life. The man who keeps his word to himself even when no one's tracking it. The man whose prayer is a conversation, not a performance.

"Your Father, who sees what is done in secret, will reward you." — Matthew 6:6

That's the formation season. Not the Sunday version of yourself. The Tuesday one.

Save this for the morning it matters.

#faith #christianmen #scripture #integrity #godlymen #manofgod #character #christianity #matthew6
